creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
Macromedia Flash has been Adobe Flash for quite some time.  Update the Handbook desktop/browsers section to reflect this.

Fix: Apply patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: See http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop-browsers.html#MOZ-FLASH-PLUGIN
